landing.description: Landing page (/) — route-specific JS excluding shared framework

play.description: Game page (/play) — total JS including all dynamic imports

notes.phaser: Phaser 3.90 is monolithic (~1.3MB minified, ~346KB gzip). Not tree-shakeable. Matter.js is bundled inside.
notes.framework: React + Next.js framework JS is ~168KB gzip (shared on all routes). Not counted in route-specific budgets.
notes.treeshakeable: miniplex (sideEffects: false), lucide-react (sideEffects: false). Both tree-shake correctly.
notes.notTreeshakeable: phaser (no sideEffects declaration), pathfinding (no sideEffects declaration).
notes.audio: All audio is placeholder (silent AudioBuffers generated at runtime). No external audio files to lazy-load yet.
notes.analyzerMode: Run 'pnpm analyze' to generate bundle analysis visualization.
